ab: yathili ki danenay ku gakuli lukavaivai panwa dadavacaku mugaku la dadavacaku mutavanane
ch: 我的學校在我們家旁邊，我天天走路去學校，也走路回家。
en: My school is next to our house, I walk to school every day, and I also walk home.

ab: kai swaadraw ku gakunay kai tapangale ku banudhu la mathingathingalenay makanaelre.
ch: 我們學校不大，沒有很多學生，大家互相認識。
en: Our school is not big, there are not many students, everyone knows each other.

ab: sanaka lavavalake yaielrelre ikay talailailadhane, karededele ngimaimalri, karededele kalaelaelange.
ch: 所有小朋友會聚在操場，一起玩球、一起聊天。
en: All the children will gather in the playground, play ball and chat together.

ab: ku lasingsi si kunay lamaelrenay kivavange, maadraw kay tacekecekelanenay ikay gaku.
ch: 老師們也會和我們一起玩，學校是個大家庭。
en: The teachers also play with us, the school is one big family.

ab: lukakaiya tara wasuasuapenay makanaelre pakabula ki takibulrubulrwnenay
ch: 我們每天都要打掃，大家要把教室打掃乾淨。
en: We have to clean every day, and everyone has to clean the classroom.

ab: yakay ku drumane ku waselredre ki lribange yakay ku drumane ku waswape.
ch: 有些人去擦窗戶，有些人去掃地。
en: Some people clean the windows, some sweep the floor.

ab: sanaka pacingane gaku laswapenay, maparauralubu makanaelre, lukakaiya laka takabulane kay gakunay
ch:
我們nay
打掃學校的各個角落，大家分工合作，學校每天都很乾淨。
en: We will also clean every corner of the school. Everyone works together, and the school is very clean every day.
